creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2006-12-03 06:06:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/katapult   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Katapult is a KDE application that gives you faster access to
  your applications, bookmarks, and more! It is plugin-based and
  can launch anything it has a plugin for. Its plugin-driven
  appearance is completely customizable. Katapult was inspired
  by Quicksilver for OS X, and it is written in C++.
  
  WWW: http://wiki.thekatapult.org.uk/Home
  
  PR:             ports/104324
  Submitted by:   Yu-Xi Lim <yuxi at gmx.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.268     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/deskutils/katapult/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/katapult/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/deskutils/katapult/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +96 -0     ports/deskutils/katapult/pkg-plist (new)
